config.StoneChanceMultiplier.name: Stone Density
config.StoneChanceMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for overall stone spawn density per floor.
Base chance: 10-30% (Mines), 20-60% (Quarry Mine), 10-30% (Skull Cavern)
config.SkullCavernOreChanceMultiplier.to:
Multiplier for the chance that a stone in Skull Cavern becomes an ore node.
Base chance: 2-16% (Skull Cavern floor 1-100)
config.CopperOreMultiplier.name: Copper Ore
config.CopperOreMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for copper ore node spawn rate.
Base chance: 2.9% (Mines floor 1-40), 1% (Quarry Mine)
config.IronOreMultiplier.name: Iron Ore
config.IronOreMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for iron ore node spawn rate.
Base chance: 2.9% (Mines floor 41-80), 1% (Quarry Mine), 50% (Skull Cavern)
config.GoldOreMultiplier.name: Gold Ore
config.GoldOreMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for gold ore node spawn rate.
Base chance: 2.9% (Mines floor 81-120), 7% (Skull Cavern)
config.IridiumOreMultiplier.name: Iridium Ore
config.IridiumOreMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for iridium ore node spawn rate.
Base chance: 0.03-43% (Skull Cavern floor 1-100)
config.RadioactiveOreMultiplier.name: Radioactive Ore
config.RadioactiveOreMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for radioactive ore node spawn rate.
Base chance: 0.1-0.2% (Danger Mines), 0.2-0.3% (Danger Skull Cavern floor 1-100)
config.MysticStoneMultiplier.name: Mystic Stone
config.MysticStoneMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for mystic stone spawn rate. Chance scales with mining skill and luck.
Base chance: 0.005-0.006% (Mines floor 100+, Skull Cavern)
config.GemNodeMultiplier.name: Purple Gem Stone
config.GemNodeMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for purple gem stone spawn rate. Chance scales with mining skill and luck.
Base chance: 0.05-0.07% (Mines, Skull Cavern)
config.DiamondNodeMultiplier.name: Diamond Node
config.DiamondNodeMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for diamond node spawn rate. Chance increases with depth and luck.
Base chance: 0.07-0.13% (Mines floor 51-120), 0.13-0.2% (Skull Cavern floor 1-100)
config.GemStoneMultiplier.name: Regular Gem Stone
config.GemStoneMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for gem stone spawn rate. Chance increases with depth.
Base chance: 0.2-0.7% (Mines floor 11-120), 0.7-1.1% (Skull Cavern floor 1-100)
config.CoalNodeMultiplier.name: Coal Node
config.CoalNodeMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for coal node spawn rate. Chance scales with daily luck.
Base chance: 9% (Quarry Mine)
config.MineForageableMultiplier.name: Forageable
config.MineForageableMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for forageable item spawn rate.
Base chance: 0.25% (Mines, Skull Cavern), 0.01% (Quarry Mine), 0% (Elevator floors)
config.VolcanoStoneDensityMultiplier.too:
Multiplier for overall stone spawn density.
Base chance: 7-11%
config.VolcanoCinderShardMultiplier.name: Cinder Shard
config.VolcanoCinderShardMultiplier.tool:
Multiplier for cinder shard node spawn rate. Chance scales with floor and luck.
Base chance: 0.7-1.5% (floor 1-9)
config.VolcanoGoldOreMultiplier.name: Gold Ore
config.VolcanoGoldOreMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for gold ore node spawn rate. Chance scales with floor.
Base chance: 0.9-1.8% (floor 1-9)
config.VolcanoCoalNodeMultiplier.name: Coal Node
config.VolcanoCoalNodeMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for coal node spawn rate. Chance scales with floor.
Base chance: 1.1-2.2% (floor 1-9)
config.VolcanoDiamondNodeMultiplier.name: Diamond Node
config.VolcanoDiamondNodeMultiplier.tool:
Multiplier for diamond node spawn rate.
Base chance: 0.05%
config.VolcanoGemStoneMultiplier.name: Regular Gem Stone
config.VolcanoGemStoneMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for gem stone spawn rate.
Base chance: 0.07% (Emerald), 0.02% (Aquamarine, floor 3+)
config.VolcanoMagmaCapMultiplier.name: Magma Cap
config.VolcanoMagmaCapMultiplier.tooltip:
Multiplier for magma cap spawn rate.
Base chance: 0.1% (regular floors), 3.5% (Mushroom floors)
